title: Turning The Other Cheek: Why UAE Won't Strike Back At Iran, Yet
summary_full: Restraint, and a lot of it, has been at the core of the United Arab Emirates' reply to the barrage of drone and missile attacks by neighbour Iran since war consumed the Middle East on Feb 28.
summary_public: Restraint, and a lot of it, has been at the core of the United Arab Emirates' reply to the barrage of drone and missile attacks by neighbour Iran since war consumed the Middle East on Feb 28.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: UAE Won't Strike Back At Iran, Yet
